source.sqlReaderQuery:
With Response_Data AS
(
SELECT 
    CAST(B.CreationDate AS DATE) AS ResponseDate, 
    COUNT(B.Survey_ID) AS ResponseCount
FROM 
    EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses B
WHERE 
    B.Response_Date is not null and B.ActiveInd='1'
    AND 
    (    B.Survey_Status IN ('COMPLETED','DELIVERED_AND_REMINDED') or B.Survey_Status is NULL
    )
GROUP BY 
    CAST(B.CreationDate AS DATE)
--ORDER BY 
    --EOMONTH(CAST(B.CreationDate AS DATE))
),
Invite_Data AS
(
Select A.CreationDate as ResponseDate,Count(A.Survey_ID) as InvitationsCount 
from (
Select CAST(Creation_Date as Date) as CreationDate,Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Invitations where Active_Ind='1' and
Survey_Status in ('Abandoned','In progress','No Response','Scheduled','SURVEY_ENGINE_ONLY','EXCLUDED','DELIVERED','DELIVERED_NO_REMINDER','EXPIRED','DELIVERY_FAILED','DELIVERED_AND_REMINDED')
--and CAST(Creation_Date as DATE) BETWEEN '2024-05-01' and '2024-05-31' 
and Survey_ID not in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses where ActiveInd='1')
UNION
Select CAST(CreationDate as Date) as ResponseDate,Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses where ActiveInd='1' --where CAST(CreationDate as DATE) BETWEEN '2024-05-01' and '2024-05-31'
) A
group by A.CreationDate
--order by EOMONTH(A.CreationDate)

)
Select A.ResponseDate as Survey_Month,A.ResponseCount as Total_Response_Count,B.InvitationsCount as Total_Survey_Sent_Count,
0 as Survey_Sent_Count_Medallia,
0 as Surevy_Sent_Count_Guild,
0 as Response_Count_Medallia,
0 as Response_Count_Guild,
CAST((A.ResponseCount*100.0/B.InvitationsCount) as Decimal(8,2)) as Response_Rate from
Invite_Data B inner join Response_Data A on B.ResponseDate=A.ResponseDate
Order by B.ResponseDate
